item.title: Introduction to Python Metaclasses
item.description: Introduction to Python Metaclasses Metaclasses are an advanced and somewhat lesser-known feature in Python, but they hold immense power. In essence, metaclasses are the classes of classes. They define how classes behave, just as classes define how instances behave. While regular classes in Python are blueprints for creating objects, metaclasses are blueprints for creating classes. Why Use Metaclasses? You might ask: Why do we need a class for a class? Metaclasses allow for customization of class creation.

item.title: Feedback Form
item.description: This article will be published soon …

item.title: Network Intrusion Detection System V0.1
item.description: A binary classification machine learning model for Intrusion Detection System. A special thanks to Satish Kamble. Abstract This machine learning model for binary classification identifies users on our network system and divides them into benign and malignant categories. Every network, whether it is private or public, is vulnerable to assaults that stop the regular flow of traffic on networks, as we all know. The fundamental goal of developing this architecture was to protect both public and private networks while warning the administrator of potential future harm.

item.title: Kaggle Connectivity to Colab
item.description: I’ll outline how to upload a Kaggle dataset straight to Google Colab in this article. Prerequisite Colab Kaggle Dataset Steps: 1. Choose Dataset Pick the dataset you want to import into CoLab. I will be using Reviews for Hotels Worldwide (Booking.com) 2. API Token To download a dataset, kaggle services require authentication. You must now download an API token. You may quickly generate this token from your Kaggle account’s profile page.

item.title: Certificates
item.description: All of the certificates I have earned or intend to earn are included on this page. Snowflake Coursera PyCaret: Anatomy of Regression Machine Learning Pipelines with Azure ML Studio Tesla Stock Price Prediction using Facebook Prophet CDAC PG Diploma in Big Data Analytics
